name: network-engineering
description: Network-engineering team — 2 agents (network-architect, network-operations-engineer) for the ENTERPRISE network layer below the cloud VPC: campus/datacenter/WAN topology, routing (OSPF/BGP/EIGRP/static) and switching (VLANs, STP, LACP, VXLAN/EVPN), IP addressing/IPAM and DNS/DHCP, segmentation + zero-trust network access (microsegmentation, NAC, SASE/SD-WAN), load balancing, redundancy/HA (HSRP/VRRP, dual-homing), and day-2 ops (change windows, troubleshooting the OSI stack, observability/NetFlow). Knowledge bank with Mermaid decision trees (topology, routing-protocol selection, segmentation) + a dated 2026 capability map, 5 skills, best-practices, 4 templates, 1 advisory hook (any/any rules, telnet, no change window). Design-before-config; protocol-before-vendor-CLI. Seams: cloud VPC networking -> aws/azure/gcp-cloud; service mesh / k8s networking -> cloud-native-kubernetes; security verdicts -> security-engineering; IaC for network config -> terraform-iac. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
